name: gh-agent
description: Codex plugin guidance for working with GitHub issues, branches, commits, and pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Work from GitHub issues to polished pull requests.
interface.longDescription: Adds a focused workflow for Codex agents that need to inspect GitHub issue context, implement changes safely, validate them, and prepare clear pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR and suggest fixes.
Summarize open issues for this repo.
